title: Infinite AE2 Fluid Cards
description: Adds an infinite water and lava card.
body:
# Infinite AE2 Fluid Cards - ![Version](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/v/infinite-ae2-fluid-cards)
This mod adds two new items, Infinite Water Cell & Infinite Lava Cell.

When in your AE2 system they provide an infinite source of lava and water, and will also sink any water and lava inputted into the system.

## Usage
You simply add this to your AE2 drive shelf and it provides an infinite source.

![Display Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rWxV2UDA/images/c9f847ea667edd556f18e696f1be69dde1155e14.png)

## Recipes
These can be ofc tweaked with a datapack.

![How to craft water card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rWxV2UDA/images/48f81c981db543a0c43830fd1f46b54fdfacd478.png)
![How to craft lava card](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rWxV2UDA/images/d5ec2d6c749f182f203c15d4ad52ebf7ee1d0485.png)
